creator: alex_goncharov_usa@yahoo.com
text:
> If you are running EHCI, there has been no changes in the USB stack, and
> you should look for CAM/SCSI related changes:
> 
> Just grepping quickly, can this be related to what you are seeing?
> 
> http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/259722

  Author:     mav
  Date:     Sun Dec 22 13:03:33 2013 UTC (2 weeks, 5 days ago)

Thank you: this may be the trouble-causing change.  Later, I'll see if
reverting it results in being able to use the Seagate HDDs again.

The 'pciconf' for the desktop (upgraded, Seagate-problematic now):

----------------------------------------------------------------------
pciconf -lv
